scripts.setup: node scripts/check-env.js && node scripts/setup-web-config.js && npm run setup:api && npm run setup:web
scripts.dev: concurrently -k --kill-signal SIGTERM -n api,worker,scheduler,web -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:api:reload" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:scheduler" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:docker: npm run docker:up && npm run dev
scripts.dev:api: cd api && exec uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:api:reload: cd api && exec cross-env UVICORN_RELOAD=true uv run python run.py
scripts.dev:worker: cd api && exec cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run taskiq worker tasks.broker:broker --fs-discover --tasks-pattern 'src/tasks/definitions/*.py' --tasks-pattern 'src/tasks/schedules/*.py' --ack-type when_executed --workers 1 --max-async-tasks 4 --max-tasks-per-child 20 --hardkill-count 1 --log-level INFO
scripts.dev:scheduler: cd api && exec cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run taskiq scheduler tasks.scheduler:scheduler --fs-discover --tasks-pattern 'src/tasks/definitions/*.py' --tasks-pattern 'src/tasks/schedules/*.py' --skip-first-run --log-level INFO
scripts.dev:web: cd web && cross-env NX_DAEMON=false yarn dev
scripts.dev:kill-orphans: pkill -9 -f '[t]askiq worker' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f '[t]askiq scheduler' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f '[p]ython run.py' 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.db:migrate: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic -c src/core/db/migrations/alembic.ini revision --autogenerate
scripts.db:create: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run python scripts/ensure_database.py
scripts.db:upgrade: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic -c src/core/db/migrations/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:downgrade: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic -c src/core/db/migrations/alembic.ini downgrade -1
scripts.db:history: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic -c src/core/db/migrations/alembic.ini history
scripts.db:current: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run alembic -c src/core/db/migrations/alembic.ini current
scripts.fixtures:load: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run python manage_fixtures.py fixtures load
scripts.fixtures:load:entity: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run python manage_fixtures.py fixtures load --entity $npm_config_entity
scripts.bootstrap:superuser: cd api && cross-env PYTHONPATH=src uv run python scripts/bootstrap_superuser.py
scripts.setup:fresh: npm install --silent --no-audit --no-fund && npm run preflight && npm run setup && npm run docker:up && npm run wait:db && npm run db:create && npm run db:upgrade && npm run bootstrap:superuser
scripts.static:download: cd api && uv run python scripts/download_static_files.py
scripts.lint:api: cd api && uv run ruff check . --fix
scripts.format:api: cd api && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:api:check: cd api && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.e2e: cd web && yarn nx run magnet-admin:e2e
scripts.e2e:ci: cd web && yarn nx run magnet-admin:e2e --browser chrome --headless
